articles.title: Niti Aayog to revamp Aspirational Districts Programme
articles.description: The Aspirational Districts Programme (ADP), the flagship scheme to transform 112 underdeveloped districts, will be revamped as the NITI Aayog aims to incorporate “major refinements and structural improvements in the existing framework, with selective modifications in programme design and implementation process”, the policy think tank told a House panel. New districts might be added to the scheme, it stated.

articles.title: Nifty under pressure; 23,000 break sparks further concern: Analysts

Trading strategies and top stock picks for the week are also provided.

articles.title: MTM losses likely for lenders as yields on govt bonds hit 12-month high
articles.description: Rising sovereign bond yields are expected to cause significant mark-to-market losses for banks in the March quarter. articles.title: Financial services companies buck weak market to rock IPO show
articles.description: Financial services firms achieved record fundraising in FY26, raising ₹49,795 crore through IPOs, the highest in a decade. Despite a struggling finance sector index, these new listings significantly boosted the primary market. Major IPOs from Tata Capital and HDB Financial Services led this surge, accounting for a substantial portion of the total funds raised.

articles.description: US President Donald Trump said he wants to ‘take the oil in Iran’ and could seize the export hub of Kharg Island, in an interview with Financial Times published on Sunday.

articles.title: Kevin Warsh Fed chair hearing set for mid- April as inflation and rate cut tensions rise: Report
articles.description: The Senate Banking Committee is set to hold a hearing on Kevin Warsh’s Federal Reserve chair nomination as early as the week of April 13, amid political resistance, rising inflation, and uncertainty over US interest rate policy.

articles.title: PM on Iran crisis fallout: We’ll overcome together
articles.description: PM Modi emphasized the ongoing global instability post-Covid-19, urging unity to overcome challenges, especially the West Asia conflict affecting India.

articles.title: Nifty under pressure; 23,000 break sparks further concern: Analysts
articles.description: Geopolitical tensions in West Asia are expected to cause continued downward trends and sharp swings in Nifty this week. Analysts suggest Nifty could fall to the 22,500–22,400 zone if it remains below 23,000. Investors are advised to watch for key support levels around 21,900–21,700. Trading strategies and top stock picks for the week are also provided.

articles.title: MTM losses likely for lenders as yields on govt bonds hit 12-month high
articles.description: Rising sovereign bond yields are expected to cause significant mark-to-market losses for banks in the March quarter. Despite RBI's open market operation purchases, escalating geopolitical tensions and inflation concerns have pushed 10-year government bond yields to a 12-month high, impacting bank portfolios.

articles.title: Up to 30% payout! New US Treasury programme incentivises tips on Medicare, Medicaid fraud
articles.description: US Treasury is launching a new whistleblower programme offering up to 30% of fines for tips on Medicare and Medicaid fraud, as authorities intensify a crackdown on multi-billion-dollar healthcare scams.

topStories.title: No Kings protests draw large crowds to rally against Donald Trump
topStories.description: One of the flagship No Kings rallies happened in Minnesota, where singer Bruce Springsteen performed to crowds.

topStories.title: Iran accuses US of plotting ground attack, as Israel steps up bombardment
topStories.description: Power being restored after Iran's Ministry of Energy reported outages in the capital, Tehran following attacks.

topStories.title: Israeli police block Latin Patriarch from Palm Sunday mass in Jerusalem
topStories.description: The move drew criticism from the church, global leaders and the US ambassador. Israel's PM said it was a safety measure following recent Iranian strikes.

topStories.title: I am the candidate in all 294 seats in Bengal polls: Mamata
topStories.description: The Trinamool Congress chairperson urges the electorate to have faith in her; “forget who is your candidate, I am the candidate everywhere”

topStories.title: Drone scare near Air Force One triggers ground stop at Florida's Palm Beach Airport - Report
topStories.description: A ground stop is an air traffic control measure where aircraft are temporarily not allowed to take off from an airport

topStories.title: IRGC spokesperson says Trump ‘only understands the language of force’
topStories.description: IRGC spokesperson Ebrahim Zolfaghari dismisses threats of US ground operations.

topStories.title: US Supreme Court set to hear Trump’s bid to end birthright citizenship
topStories.description: At the heart of the case is Executive Order, titled “Protecting the Meaning and Value of American Citizenship.” The order seeks to deny automatic citizenship to children born in the US to undocumented immigrants or parents on temporary visas after February 19, 2025.

topStories.title: Vijay follows in the footseteps of Tamil Nadu politicians with a penchant for dual contests
topStories.description: TVK leader to contest two urban seats in debut election; precedent set by Jayalalithaa, who once contested four seats; PT, DMK, Congress leaders have also attempted dual contests, with less than stellar results

topStories.title: Cuba is not alone, deputy FM says as US threats grow
topStories.description: Cuba's deputy foreign minister says island will resist US pressure as sanctions deepen, blackouts and tensions escalate.

dailyNews.title: Mojtaba's New Message, Days After Trump's 'Don't Know If He's Alive' Claim
dailyNews.description: Iran's new supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei has in a written message thanked the people of Iraq for their support in the war against the United States and Israel, Iranian media said on Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Republican Mace says Congress must approve any US troop deployment to Iran
dailyNews.description: Despite general support for war, several Republicans say boots on the ground would be a political Rubicon for Trump.

dailyNews.title: 'Justice For Zubeen Garg In 100 Days': Congress' Poll Promise In Assam
dailyNews.description: Even as the countdown to the April 9 polls in Assam has begun, the main Opposition Congress on Wednesday released its Assembly election manifesto, announcing five key guarantees.

dailyNews.title: Uniform Civil Code, Zero Infiltrators: Amit Shah's Big Promise To Assam
dailyNews.description: The Congress, for its vote bank politics, had changed the entire demographic pattern of Assam. Many districts have turned Muslim-dominated, Amit Shah alleged.

dailyNews.title: Trump shares letter about ‘only way to Heaven’ as Pope Leo says ‘God doesn't listen to prayers of those who make war'
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump shared a letter from evangelist Franklin Graham discussing faith and the path to Heaven. Graham praised Trump’s leadership in peacemaking and urged conservatives to unite against the Democrat agenda. This follows Graham’s prior endorsement of Trump at CPAC.

dailyNews.title: Restricting social harm: US verdicts expose social media's design flaws - Business Standard
dailyNews.description: Restricting social harm: US verdicts expose social media's design flaws  Business Standard

dailyNews.title: New images show destruction of $300 million USAF E-3 Sentry, struck by Iranian missile in Saudi's Prince Sultan Air Base
dailyNews.description: Iran's IRGC reportedly destroyed a US AWACS plane, leading to significant military losses. Ukrainian intelligence suggests Russia may have aided Iran by providing satellite imagery. The US has lost numerous military assets, with costs estimated between $1.4 billion and $2.9 billion.

dailyNews.title: 'No Kings’ protesters debut rewrite of ‘America the Beautiful’ verse to include 'thy immigrant'
dailyNews.description: Protesters in Washington, D.C., sang rewritten lyrics to “America the Beautiful" during a “No Kings" rally, as tensions over ICE enforcement and the DHS funding standoff continue.

dailyNews.title: Ruling against Meta and Google could set the stage for changes in handling hate content
dailyNews.description: Meta and Google dispute a social media addiction verdict that bypassed Section 230 by targeting product design, raising new platform liability questions.

dailyNews.title: UConn's Braylon Mullins hits game-winning 3-pointer to shock Duke, advance to men's Final Four
dailyNews.description: UConn Huskes freshman Braylon Mullins threw up a prayer and it was answered as his 3-pointer completed a comeback against the Duke Blue Devils.

dailyNews.title: Why Meta and Google are losing court battles for damaging kids by trying to get them addicted
dailyNews.description: Juries ordered Meta and Google to pay millions over child safety failures, raising urgent questions about Big Tech accountability and congressional inaction.

dailyNews.title: Passenger bomb threat triggers police response and evacuation on Frontier flight under investigation
dailyNews.description: A Frontier Airlines passenger allegedly made a bomb threat on Flight 2539 at Atlanta's airport Sunday, prompting a law enforcement response before the threat was deemed non-credible.

topStories.title: Cory Booker confronted with old clip of himself saying he loves Donald Trump
topStories.description: Sen. Cory Booker was confronted with a 2016 clip saying "I love Donald Trump" during "Meet the Press" on Sunday, and said his Christian faith still guides him to love his enemies.

topStories.title: Olena Zelenska warns abducted Ukranian kids may take ‘dozens of years’ to return, praises Melania Trump’s help
topStories.description: Olena Zelenska credits Melania Trump's advocacy for spotlighting Ukraine's push to recover thousands of children reportedly taken by Russia since 2022.

topStories.title: Castro Heirs Emerge Across Cuba’s Political Scene Amid Energy Crisis and Trump Threats
topStories.description: As Trump officials demand changes, Castro family members are suddenly popping up across Cuba’s political scene. Some even ask: Could one be the “Cuban Delcy?”

topStories.title: Special Operations Forces Sent to Mideast as Trump Weighs Next Move
topStories.description: The commandos have not been assigned specific roles. But President Trump has expressed concern about the now-closed Strait of Hormuz and Iran’s store of enriched uranium.

topStories.title: ICE May Remain at Airports Even After T.S.A. Pay Resumes, Border Czar Says
topStories.description: Transportation safety officers are set to be paid on Monday, but Tom Homan, the White House’s border czar, said ICE agents may stay where there are shortages.

dailyNews.title: ICE May Remain at Airports Even After T.S.A. Pay Resumes, Border Czar Says
dailyNews.description: Transportation safety officers are set to be paid on Monday, but Tom Homan, the White House’s border czar, said ICE agents may stay where there are shortages.

dailyNews.title: New Political Group to Push Trump’s A.I. Agenda in Midterms
dailyNews.description: The group, Innovation Council Action, says it plans to spend at least $100 million. It will be led by a former administration official.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration scaling back asylum crackdown, sources say
dailyNews.description: The unprecedented move amounted to an indefinite suspension of all asylum requests filed outside of immigration court, regardless of the applicant's nationality.

dailyNews.title: Trump sends mixed messages on Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump has repeatedly claimed, including as recently as this weekend, that the war in Iran has been won. Still, he insists that Iran also wants to negotiate as more troops head to the Middle East. Cristian Benavides has more.

dailyNews.title: Trump reportedly warns to 'take the oil in Iran' as Tehran targets water, power plants in Kuwait
dailyNews.description: The Middle East conflict has entered its fifth week, with attacks expanding across the region and raising risks to energy and infrastructure.

dailyNews.title: Pakistan prepared to host U.S.-Iran talks in 'coming days' as Trump weighs deploying ground troops
dailyNews.description: Foreign ministers of Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Turkey and Egypt all arrived in Islamabad to discuss the evolving regional situation in the Middle East.

dailyNews.title: Trump ban on investor homebuying may come at cost of a bigger real estate deal
dailyNews.description: President Trump's plan to ban big investors from home ownership may not be the key to reviving the American Dream in affordable housing legislation.

dailyNews.title: Not everyone can expect a bigger tax refund this year — what's actually driving your result
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has said this will be the "largest tax refund season of all time," as a result of his "big beautiful bill." Here's what the megabill means for taxpayers.

dailyNews.title: How the big oil and gas CEOs think the Iran war supply disruption will play out
dailyNews.description: The oil industry's grim outlook for global oil and gas supplies stands in contrast to the Trump administration's promise that the disruption is short term.

dailyNews.title: The problem for investors: We don't know how Trump wants the Iran war to end
dailyNews.description: In his Sunday column for Investing Club subscribers, Jim Cramer argues that the S&P 500 is likely to see further declines during the Iran war.

dailyNews.title: Looking to limit birthright citizenship, Trump turns to an 1884 ruling against a Native American man
dailyNews.description: Defending birthright citizenship changes, President Donald Trump's administration is citing an 1884 Supreme Court case called Elk v. Wilkins about voting rights for a Native American man.

dailyNews.title: Zelenskyy asked if Trump cares about the future of Ukraine
dailyNews.description: In an interview with NBC News’ Raf Sanchez, President Zelenskyy says that he hopes President Trump cares about the future of Ukraine, but “they care about the United States more.”

dailyNews.title: TSA officers still calling out sick after Trump's directive to pay them
dailyNews.description: Some of the nation's airports are still seeing long wait lines as Transportation Security Administration officers continued to call out sick over the weekend.
